highlighted.whyItMatters: Legacy CSS files such as handsontable.full.min.css are removed. Configure themes through the new Theme API or import the built-in theme CSS that ships with version 17.

The old wrapper packages (@handsontable/angular, @handsontable/react, @handsontable/vue), the PersistentState plugin, and the legacy undo/redo methods are gone. Switch to the current wrapper packages and remove any code that depends on PersistentState.

highlighted.tagline: New sanitizer option replaces built-in DOMPurify
highlighted.whyItMatters: Handsontable no longer bundles DOMPurify. Pass your own sanitizer through the new sanitizer option, or convert untrusted content to plain text before rendering it in cells.

numeric cells now accept native Intl.NumberFormat options. numbro is deprecated and will be removed in a later release - move existing numericFormat patterns to Intl.NumberFormat to avoid future breakage.
A built-in multiselect cell type ships with its own editor, renderer, and validator. Use it instead of hand-rolled multi-value editors for selecting more than one option per cell.
